description: Steam Deck Save/Load focus fix. Opening the Save/Load overlay from the main menu with a controller must move focus INTO the dialog (not leave it on the menu buttons drawn behind it), let the D-pad walk the existing-saves ItemList (PadRouter no longer steals its focus), reach every action button across the spacer gap (Import -> Main Menu -> Close), and close on B — restoring focus to the button that opened it. No fixture: the runner stays on the MainMenu, which is exactly where the bug was reported.

steps.script:
for nm in ["scn_focus_A", "scn_focus_B", "scn_focus_C"]:
	SaveLoadManager.save_game(nm, {})
tree.current_scene.save_load_dialog.refresh_saves_list()
return SaveLoadManager.get_save_files().size() >= 3

var d = tree.current_scene.save_load_dialog
var fo = tree.root.get_viewport().gui_get_focus_owner()
var n = fo
while n != null:
	if n == d: return true
	n = n.get_parent()
return false

var d = tree.current_scene.save_load_dialog
var fo = tree.root.get_viewport().gui_get_focus_owner()
var inside = false
var n = fo
while n != null:
	if n == d: inside = true
	n = n.get_parent()
return inside

var d = tree.current_scene.save_load_dialog
var i = d._first_selectable_save_index()
d.saves_list.grab_focus()
d.saves_list.select(i)
d._on_save_selected(i)
return d.saves_list.get_selected_items()[0]

var d = tree.current_scene.save_load_dialog
d.import_button.grab_focus()
return tree.root.get_viewport().gui_get_focus_owner() == d.import_button
